name: 8 MG Methylprednisolone Tablets IP
about: 8 MG Methylprednisolone Tablets IP is a type of general medicine that comes in the form of solid tablets. Each tablet contains 8 mg of the active ingredient methylprednisolone. This medicine is sourced from India and is suitable for storage in a dry place. It is commonly used to treat a variety of conditions such as allergies, inflammation, and certain types of cancer.

faq.q: What is the dosage of each tablet?
faq.a: Each tablet contains 8 mg of methylprednisolone.

faq.q: What is the drug type of this medicine?
faq.a: This medicine belongs to the category of general medicines.

faq.q: What is the recommended storage condition for this medicine?
faq.a: It is recommended to store this medicine in a dry place.

faq.q: Is this medicine suitable for long-term use?
faq.a: The appropriate duration of use depends on the condition being treated and the patients response to the medicine. It is best to consult a doctor before using this medicine for an extended period.

faq.q: Can this medicine be taken with other medications?
faq.a: It is essential to consult a doctor before taking this medicine with other medications as it may interact with certain drugs.
